PREAMBLE: IN THE SUPREME COURT OF INDIA
Criminal Appeal No. 1000 of 2013 BEFORE: Justice N.V. Ramana
FACTS: FACTS

SUBMISSIONS: :
The appellant was convicted under Section 304B IPC for the offence of Domestic Violence. The learned Sessions Judge convicted the accused and sentenced him to rigorous imprisonment. The matter was taken up before the Supreme Court of India.
ANALYSIS: SUBMISSIONS

facts: :
The learned counsel for the appellant submitted that the trial court had erred in appreciating the evidence on record. The prosecution examined 8 witnesses to prove its case beyond reasonable doubt.
order: ANALYSIS

ORDER: :
After careful consideration of the
